3085900.name: Reclamation Crew
3085900.description:
Join your comrades in this co-op horror as you explore procedurally generated maps while looting as much as you can to fulfil the mandated quota in the given timeframe.

Shrouded in darkness inside the abandoned research stations you become the prey of what lies beneath the ice. Run, hide, do what you can to survive but most importantly, loot.

Upgrade your base and unlock new perks to give you a much needed edge when out on expeditions.

Brave the extreme conditions of one of the most remote and inhospitable places on earth... The Arctic Circle.

Low visibility and extreme cold challenge your orienteering skills as you navigate from Station to Station. Your compass and flares can only do so much, in the Arctic you are on your own and getting lost is almost certain death. If you are lucky enough to survive the elements the wolves will hunt you down sooner or later.

Delve deep into procedurally generated underground research stations.

Explore the many research stations and outposts abandoned after the war. The large and undocumented interiors of the research stations prove to be a navigational challenge in it's self as you try to gain access to the lower floors containing Labs and Storage depots in search of anything left by it's old inhabitants. Try not to get lost in the lower floors, or eaten for that matter. You are not alone.

Loot the lockers and corpses of the past inhabitants of the stations.

Your primary objective is to retrieve as much scientific research data as you can and deliver them back to the USSR to help push the state forwards using the secrets and developments of the cowardly enemy. You are to search every corner of each station in the vicinity for traces and tidbits of technological advancement. Failing that you are to reclaim as many valuable items as possible so they can be sold off to western consumers or melted down for its raw materials.

Game Features

  • Procedural station generation

  • Loot valuable items to reach quota

  • 8 player coop

  • Solve puzzles to gain access to locked areas

  • Hide and escape from unique monsters

  • Navigate procedural arctic overworld

  • Proximity voice

  • Persistent progression

  • Player perks

Congratulations! You have been selected for Reclamation Duty!

As part of the Reclamation Crew you will play a crucial role in the rebuilding of the USSR!

You will join as part of a crew stationed in the Arctic Circle, with the primary objective of recovering scientific research and items deemed valuable by the state.

A full investigation has determined that there is no indication of danger in the nearby abandoned research stations, you will proceed without question. Any misinformation or propaganda suggesting otherwise will not be tolerated.

Failure to meet mandated quotas will result in crew termination.
3085900.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯语, 日语, 韩语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 简体中文, 繁体中文
*具有完全音频支持的语言
